generated by AI in Github cloud

# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Guideline

## Purpose
Enforce a consistent and auditable marker for AI-generated artifacts.

## Rules
- For every newly created file, include the exact text `generated by AI in Github cloud` near the top.
- For every newly created class, include the exact text `generated by AI in Github cloud` in or directly above the class definition.
- Keep the text exact for consistency and auditability.

## When to use
- Mandatory whenever creating a new file.
- Mandatory whenever creating a new class.
